message:
fix(tui): update test expectations to match current status bar format

- TestRenderStatusBar: check for 'provider' instead of 'quit' in narrow view
- TestStatusBarSeveritySnapshots: update expected format to [key:action] style
- TestRenderStatusBarThreeSegments: check for 'provider'/'tab' instead of 'quit'
- TestProfilesPanel_View_Empty: check for 'No profiles for' instead of 'No profiles saved'

The status bar was refactored to use [tab:provider] format instead of
the older 'q quit ? help' format, but tests weren't updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
